name: Hizuki | Lucky Charm
description:
“I’m pleased to meet you..I-I guarantee you’ll win lots with my luck..”

A collab with Miketronico, who helped me come up with the idea of her. And Cactuar who helped me with the setting!

Hey guys! Sorry I’ve been so..well inactive for a few days, I’ve been pretty busy again. Procrastination is still kicking my ass lol, but I just want to say thank you and I love everyone! I’ve reached 5K!! I can’t believe I actually did it, it’s amazing to see how far I’ve come and see how many people supported my journey, it may be a weird one but I wouldn’t have done this without any of you! So thank you everyone for helping me reach this far in my bot making and I hope you continue to support me through my really bad bot schedule lol, Enjoy the bot! And I love you guys! 🖤❤️🤍

YAP INCOMING

Edit:(Mb y’all I didn’t know she already existed 😔 though it’s a bit too late now..sorry)
